title: Dangerous Mobs
description: Vanilla friendly but dangerous, hostile and destructive mobs.
body:
**This mob is currently unfinished.  
This mod contains light elements of suspense.**

![DANGEROUS MOBS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11d40003f7bf57b50319a9cd781aa3468cc8ec6a_0.webp)


# Introduction

Dangerous Mobs adds several mobs that are either dangerous, hostile or destructive and things made of their drops.

In the Overworld, Nether and The End, you will encounter various dangerous mobs. Even the mobs on the surface and in the deep caves of the Overworld are different. You'd better prepare iron equipment before venturing into the deepslate.

Some of the mobs drops valuable ingredients, especially magic and soul debris. These ingredients can be used to make some useful equipment or tools.
You may also taste foods drops by these mobs, although they seems disgusting. 

Some of the challenging mobs are labeled as bosses although they do not show health bars. These mobs are strong, and they are the only way to gain magic or soul upgrade. If you want to have soul or magic equipment (no armor currently), beat them first.

![DANGEROUS MOBS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a70a1983cc2218f2d0db44a85b76a078099ab44.png)

# Future Plans

- More mobs, two or three mini bosses
- More foods, tools, and soul and magic armor
- Another mod of biomes that may integrate with this mod.

Plans above may change or not be completed.

# Credits
Some of the sound effects are obtained from [Zapsplat](https://www.zapsplat.com/) and edited by [Audacity](https://www.audacityteam.org/)

Assets adapted from [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net/) and gained from [MC Assets](https://mcasset.cloud/)

Models by [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/)

Programmed by [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
